Title: Enable automated IaC scanning
Weakness Description: IaC changes are not yet automatically scanned in CI
Remediation Plan: Integrate Checkov or tfsec into GitHub Actions

Title: Formalize secure baseline modules
Weakness Description: Secure Terraform or cloud baseline modules are not yet standardized
Remediation Plan: Publish approved reusable modules and require their use

Title: Create evidence retention process
Weakness Description: Audit evidence references are not yet governed by a retention process
Remediation Plan: Define evidence retention and reviewer signoff process
